verses.text: God bids twelve men take twelve stones from the riverbed. The stones. A memorial is gathered.
God bids twelve men take twelve stones from the riverbed. The stones. A memorial is gathered.
God bids twelve men take twelve stones from the riverbed. The stones. A memorial is gathered.
They are a sign, that children may ask their meaning. A sign. The wonder is remembered.
They are a sign, that children may ask their meaning. A sign. The wonder is remembered.
They are a sign, that children may ask their meaning. A sign. The wonder is remembered.
They are a sign, that children may ask their meaning. A sign. The wonder is remembered.
Joshua sets up stones in Jordan and at Gilgal. Set up. The crossing is marked.
Joshua sets up stones in Jordan and at Gilgal. Set up. The crossing is marked.
The priests stood till all passed; the armed tribes went before. Passed. All crossed in order.
The priests stood till all passed; the armed tribes went before. Passed. All crossed in order.
The priests stood till all passed; the armed tribes went before. Passed. All crossed in order.
The priests stood till all passed; the armed tribes went before. Passed. All crossed in order.
God magnified Joshua; when the priests came up, the waters returned. Returned. The miracle is complete.
God magnified Joshua; when the priests came up, the waters returned. Returned. The miracle is complete.
God magnified Joshua; when the priests came up, the waters returned. Returned. The miracle is complete.
God magnified Joshua; when the priests came up, the waters returned. Returned. The miracle is complete.
God magnified Joshua; when the priests came up, the waters returned. Returned. The miracle is complete.
They camped at Gilgal and pitched the twelve stones. Gilgal. The first camp in the land.
They camped at Gilgal and pitched the twelve stones. Gilgal. The first camp in the land.
The stones teach all peoples that 'the hand of the LORD is mighty.' Mighty. The memorial preaches God's power.
